title: T. Rowe (TROW) to Buy Retiree, Ups Retirement Planning Ability
text: T. Rowe's (TROW) acquisition of Retiree will provide personalized retirement income solutions and services.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For April 2023
text: NOBL gave up a big chunk of its January gains in February, finishing the month down 2.36%. March has seen the ETF tumble some more as it's down 1.88% through 3/29. I present 3 strategies that can theoretically beat the dividend aristocrat index in the long term.

title: Retire Rich With This 6%-Yielding Dividend Aristocrat Portfolio
text: The banking crisis of 2023 is likely to push America into recession, possibly within four months. Stocks will likely sell off 15% to 30% before a new face-ripping bull market begins.

title: Organic Growth Aids T. Rowe Price (TROW), High Costs Ail
text: T. Rowe Price's organic growth efforts will support financials, while strong liquidity will support capital deployment plans. Yet, rising costs and overdependence on investment advisory fees are woes.

title: Analysts Warn Investors To Dump 10 Big Stocks Before It's Too Late
text: Analysts don't usually tell investors to sell S&P 500 stocks. So when they do, it's wise to pay attention.

title: 3 Financials On My Watchlist After Silicon Valley Bank's Detonation
text: Silicon Valley Bank imploded last week, leaving investors wondering what will happen to the financial system in coming weeks. My knee jerk reaction is that the bank failure doesn't represent systemic risk, but I'm waiting to see more information before I come to any firm conclusions.

title: T. Rowe Price's (TROW) February AUM Down 2.6% to $1.31T
text: T. Rowe Price's (TROW) February AUM witnesses a decline of 2.6% to $1.31 trillion due to a challenging operating backdrop.

title: The 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For March
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." --Kiplinger.com/Investing. 67 Aristocrats screened as of March 8, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated top ten net gains ranged 16.32%-32.64% topped by WBA & VFC.

title: Why Is T. Rowe Price's Dividend So High?
text: T. Rowe Price is a large asset manager. The company's business is highly impacted by the direction of stock prices.

title: T. Rowe Price: Uncertainty Spells Opportunity
text: T. Rowe Price is a well-recognized leader in the active asset management business. Its stock has underperformed major market indices this year and saw AUM growth in January.

title: T. Rowe Price: Another Hike For This Dividend Aristocrat
text: T. Rowe Price reported its annual results, which weren't great as 2022 was a rough year for markets. The company still had margins over 20% for the year and $1.8B in cash on the balance sheet.

title: T. Rowe Price Group: Reasonable Valuation And Strong Balance Sheet
text: T. Rowe Price has seen a sizable decline in AUM, but this has more to do with the macro environment than company specific factors. They have a strong track record of dividend increases and have consistently grown earnings over the long term.

title: 10 Dividend Growth Stocks - February 2023
text: In this series, I rank a selection of Dividend Radar stocks and present the ten top-ranked stocks for further research and possible investment. This month, I screened for high-yielding, discounted stocks with 5-year dividend growth rates of at least 7%. Stocks with forward yields above 4% and exceeding their 5-year average yields qualified.
